select_when: A few drivers are likely to explain a disproportionate share of the outcome, so broad effort would waste attention.
The team needs permission to ignore the long tail long enough to fix the variables that actually move the system.
Scarce attention or capital must be concentrated on the handful of customers, levers, or constraints with outsized impact.
The current plan treats the workload as evenly distributed even though the source of value is probably highly skewed.
avoid_when: An uneven distribution is being casually labeled a power law without checking whether the tail behavior really fits.
The search for dominant drivers would ignore reliability, fairness, or resilience risks living in the long tail.
